mapper.select: SELECT bt.id, bt.behavior_code AS behaviorCode, bt.behavior_name AS behaviorName, bt.behavior_category AS behaviorCategory, bt.behavior_nature AS behaviorNature, bt.default_affect_scope AS defaultAffectScope, bt.description, bt.sort_order AS sortOrder, bt.status, bt.created_at AS createdAt, bt.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM behavior_types bt WHERE bt.id = #{id} AND bt.deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM behavior_types WHERE deleted = 0 AND behavior_code = #{code}
